name: Servcorp Limited
analysis: SRV has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 16% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.6700, stop A$6.1182, target A$7.4381 (1.39:1) — then trail it.
